L1_headline: + SEM – David S. Chernow disposed shares for tax withholding. | 08/01/25
L2_brief: CEO David Chernow surrendered 49,100 shares at $12.57 to cover tax obligations on vesting restricted stock. This is a routine, non-discretionary transaction related to equity compensation and does not signal any change in insider sentiment. He retains 892,830 shares directly following the transaction.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Routine tax withholding surrender on restricted stock vesting. Transaction code 'F' indicates mandatory disposition to satisfy tax obligations, not a voluntary sale. Disposal represents approximately 5.2% of post-transaction holdings.
risks_flagged: Non-discretionary transaction for tax withholding purposes - not indicative of insider sentiment
